# Auto-generated TWISTER Pong pixel-RL reward-quantization sweep for tiny-exp-scheduler.
#
# Run from /scorpio/home/luyukuan/projects/twister with conda env twister.
# WM checkpoint: callbacks/atari100k/atari100k-pong/checkpoints_epoch_50_step_100000.ckpt
# Thresholds: [0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0]
# AC updates: 20000
# Parallel envs: 64
# Backup every: 15
# WM horizon: 512
# WM initial source: real
# WM bootstrap dataset: datasets/converted_from_diamond/pong/train
# Respect terminal: True
# W&B enabled: 1
# W&B project: rl-in-pixel-env
# Total jobs: 5
#
# Notes:
# - Only WM reward is thresholded into {-1, 0, +1}.
# - Terminal is not quantized; it remains a boolean end signal from the WM head.
#
# Usage:
#   tiny-exp-scheduler run scripts/experiments/pong_pixel_rl_rewq_sweep.commands.txt --cuda-devices auto --logs-dir pong_pixel_rl_in_env/scheduler_logs/rewq_sweep --verbose --keep-job-tabs

CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 CONDA_ENV_NAME=twister WANDB_ENABLED=1 WANDB_PROJECT=rl-in-pixel-env WANDB_ENTITY=ssl-lab WANDB_MODE=online PIXEL_RL_AC_UPDATES=20000 PIXEL_RL_ENVS=64 PIXEL_RL_BACKUP_EVERY=15 PIXEL_RL_LOG_EVERY=1000 PIXEL_RL_SAVE_EVERY=10000 PIXEL_RL_WM_ROLLOUT_VIDEO_EVERY=10000 PIXEL_RL_WM_HORIZON=512 PIXEL_RL_WM_RESPECT_TERMINAL=True PIXEL_RL_WM_INITIAL_SOURCE=real PIXEL_RL_WM_BOOTSTRAP_DATASET=datasets/converted_from_diamond/pong/train PIXEL_RL_WM_REWARD_QUANTIZE_THRESHOLD=0.1 PIXEL_RL_EVAL_REAL_EVERY=2000 PIXEL_RL_EVAL_REAL_VIDEO_EVERY=10000 PIXEL_RL_EVAL_REAL_EPS=5 PIXEL_RL_RESUME=False bash scripts/experiments/pong_pixel_rl_in_env.sh wm callbacks/atari100k/atari100k-pong/checkpoints_epoch_50_step_100000.ckpt pong_pixel_rl_in_env/logdir/twister-repro-h512-rewq0p1
